bmi270_init_i2c.tooltip: Create BMI270 IMU object and initialize via I2C (default address 0x68)

bmi270_get_data.tooltip: Update accelerometer and gyroscope data from BMI270 (must call before reading)

bmi270_get_accel.tooltip: Return acceleration value of specified axis (unit: g)

bmi270_get_gyro.tooltip: Return angular velocity value of specified axis (unit: deg/s)

bmi270_enable_step_counter.tooltip: Enable BMI270 built-in step counting (step detection + counting + activity recognition)

bmi270_get_step_count.tooltip: Return current step count from BMI270 step counter

bmi270_reset_step_count.tooltip: Reset BMI270 step counter to zero
